title: helianthus vulgaris
intro: Helianthus vulgaris, also known as common sunflower, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Helianthus vulgaris include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy. Helianthus vulgaris can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
